name: HMS HDML 1138 (ML 1138)
events: 8 Feb 1943 Around 0945 A/8, HMS P 211 (Cdr. B. Bryant, DSC, RN) ended her 8th war patrol (also 8th in the Mediterranean) at Algiers. She was escorted in by HMS HDML 1138 (?). (1)
15 May 1943 HMS Taurus (Lt.Cdr. M.R.G. Wingfield, DSO, RN) is undocked. She then conducted diving trials off Algiers while being escorted by HMS HDML 1138 (?). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
